about:
Full Stack Web Developer with 2+ years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable and user-centric web applications using the MERN stack (MySQL, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). I specialize in building complete end-to-end solutions, ranging from database design and backend architecture to responsive and modern frontend interfaces.

I have strong expertise in developing secure and efficient RESTful APIs with proper authentication, authorization, and data validation. I am also experienced in relational database management, including schema design, complex queries, optimization, and ensuring data integrity.

On the frontend, I focus on creating intuitive, responsive, and high-performance user interfaces using React.js and Material UI, ensuring a smooth and consistent user experience across all devices.

I am passionate about writing clean, maintainable, and scalable code, and I consistently aim to deliver high-quality solutions with strong emphasis on performance, security, usability, and long-term scalability.
